_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_46_note: Session 46 (2026-06-11): ASML deep session (next rotation + Terafab event active today). June 10 prices confirmed: TSM $408.33 (-4.57%), ASML $1,777.77 (+1.65%), MRVL $252.59 (-12.56%), ANET $152.16 (+1.0%), ALAB $330.86 (-3.17%). MU and NVDA estimated. TSMC May 2026 revenue confirmed: NT$416,984M ($13.25B, +30.1% YoY) — new all-time monthly record. MRVL -21.8% two-day (ByteDance→Qualcomm ASIC deal June 9; analyst downgrade + macro June 10). ASML Terafab: CEO confirms direct talks with Musk, 'very serious'; ASML tech conference June 11-12 with SpaceX presentation; High-NA EUV ($380M+) required for Terafab Intel 14A node. Iran war escalation: US strikes near Hormuz June 10; helium doubled. Phase 1b/1c gated (46%6=4). No DCF run: ASML threshold June 21 (10 days). MRVL added to event_queue at position 0 (ByteDance/Qualcomm + -21.8% two-day). TSM May revenue removed from event_queue (confirmed). Next deep priority: NVDA (DCF threshold June 21 same as ASML) or MRVL (urgent ByteDance thesis challenge; position 0 in queue).

event_queue.event: ByteDance→Qualcomm ASIC deal (June 9): Qualcomm wins ByteDance data center custom ASIC contract; MRVL falls -10.48% to $288.85 (new competitor concern, NOT confirmed MRVL program loss). June 10: analyst downgrade + macro adds -12.56% to $252.59. Two-day cumulative from June 8 peak: -21.8% ($322.77→$252.59). DCF IV $125.63, MoS -50.3% at $252.59. Next trigger: any hyperscaler ASIC program update; Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026.

Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 10 est ~$935.89 (macro decline; MoS -52.7%). Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce Q3 DRAM pricing strong. No deep session before June 24.

June 9 actual $341.70; June 10 confirmed $330.86 (-3.17%). MoS -66.2% SELL/AVOID. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins confirmed. Deep session S40 (June 3). No new deep session needed.

June 10 est ~$202 (range $199-$207; macro decline). MoS ~-22.6%. DCF last run May 21 (21 days; threshold June 21 = 10 days). Approaching mandatory DCF re-run June 21. Next primary catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026. Monitor.

June 10 confirmed $1,777.77 (+1.65%); third consecutive macro-selloff outperformance. Terafab: CEO confirms direct talks with Musk; ASML tech conference June 11-12 (active NOW). DCF threshold June 21 (10 days). Deep session S46 complete (entity updated with Terafab). Next: DCF re-run June 21.

June 10 confirmed $408.33 (-4.57% on CPI + Iran war escalation). May revenue CONFIRMED NT$416,984M ($13.25B, +30.1% YoY) — new all-time monthly record. DCF IV $414.11, MoS +1.42% = HOLD at $408.33. Iran war helium shortage: spot prices doubled; TSMC gross margin at risk. Q2 earnings July 16.

_event_queue_note: Session 44: ANET deep session complete (4 new entity entries: June 1 +5.77%, June 2 William Blair conference, June 4 -4.79%, June 5 -6.94%). ANET removed from event_queue. ASML re-added (June 5 -6.59% trigger; threshold >3%). TSM updated with confirmed $415.17 (HOLD). Priority next session: TSM May revenue ~June 10 (first item after MU gate; TSM now HOLD). After that: ASML DCF June 21, NVDA DCF June 21. MU gated until June 24.
